**Failure Details:**

session.assistant:
Plan execution complete.
**Summary of changes** (11 files, 4 renames):
- **Renamed** `plan_issues.py` → `objective_issues.py` and `CreatePlanIssueResult` → `CreateObjectiveIssueResult` - **Updated imports** in 3 source files: `init/main.py`, `objective_save_to_issue.py`, `plans_repo_labels.py` - **Updated comment** in `handle_no_changes.py` referencing old module name - **Renamed test files**: `test_plan_issues.py` → `test_objective_issues.py`, `tests/unit/plan_issues/` → `tests/unit/objective_issues/` - **Updated test imports** in 3 test files with class rename - **Updated documentation** in 2 docs referencing the old module path
**PR**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8974
**Note**: One pre-existing test failure in `test_objective_issues.py::TestCreatePlanDraftPRSuccess::test_creates_standard_plan_pr` (`assert 999 == 1`) — confirmed this fails on master too and is unrelated to this rename.
